{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Delsin
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Delsin]] is a gas giant with sparkling [[diamond]] rings.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9">''The Knight'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The moon of [[Delsin]] is visible from the [[Shadow Ark]] launch bay.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c41">''The Knight'', chapter 41</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
